summary: All 5 tasks complete. protect-config.js updated to fail-open on parse errors (exit 0 instead of exit 2). pre-compact-state.js rewritten to produce structured summary at .harness/state/pre-compact-summary.json with timestamp, sessionId, activeStream, recentDecisions, openQuestions, currentPhase fields. 31/31 tests pass across both hook suites.

Phase 2 Task 5: Full test suite verification (31/31 pass)
learnings: execFileSync does not expose stderr when process exits 0 — cannot assert stderr content for fail-open paths
pre-compact-state.js uses statSync import directly instead of require('node:fs') for ESM compatibility
